title: Test dataset for root tissue analysis pipeline
author: Kuhn Cuellar, Luis
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Test dataset of fluorescence microscopy images of root tissue samples from  A. thaliana . This dataset is used to test a root tissue analysis pipeline ( qbic-pipelines/root-tissue-analysis ).
steps_raw: Test dataset of fluorescence microscopy images of root tissue samples from  A. thaliana . This dataset is used to test a root tissue analysis pipeline ( qbic-pipelines/root-tissue-analysis ).
